Off Calendar Jun-02-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor objection, the Court orders the case dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Trina Ayala, CSR#12964. (212)
